name: Alucard
lore: In the shadowed alleys of the Moniyan Empire, where the sun’s light rarely touches the cobblestones, a child was found clutching a bloodied sword, his eyes already holding the weight of centuries. That child was Alucard, orphaned not by war but by a curse that runs deeper than any river of ink. Raised in secrecy by an order of forgotten monks, he grew up listening to whispers of a vampiric lineage he could never escape. His first transformation came at fifteen, when a demon attacked the monastery; Alucard’s fists became claws, his teeth fangs, and he tore the fiend apart with a hunger that terrified even himself. The monks, rather than cast him out, taught him to channel that darkness—to hunt those who preyed on the innocent. Now, Alucard wanders the land with his ancestral blade, Vampire’s Kiss, a weapon that thirsts as much as he does. He seeks not redemption, for he knows his soul is stained, but purpose: to ensure no other child suffers the same fate. His battles are frenzied, his movements a blur of crimson and steel, yet in quiet moments, he writes letters to a mother he never knew, burning them each dawn. The demon inside him whispers promises of power, but Alucard listens only to the cries of those he saves, for he knows that the moment he gives in, he becomes the very monster he hunts.
famousFor: His ability to sustain in long fights and chase down fleeing enemies.

abilities.name: Pursuit
abilities.description: Alucard dashes forward, dealing physical damage to enemies in his path and gaining movement speed.

abilities.name: Vampire's Kiss
abilities.description: Empowers his next basic attacks to heal him for a percentage of damage dealt.

abilities.name: Fission Wave
abilities.description: Sends a wave of energy that travels forward and returns, dealing damage twice.

ultimate: Alucard enters a state of frenzy, greatly increasing lifesteal and attack speed for a short duration. During this time, his skills have reduced cooldown.
physicalAppearance: Crimson eyes that glow in darkness
weapon: Vampire's Kiss (a double-edged sword with a blood-red gem in the hilt)
aura: An eerie red mist surrounds him when his bloodlust is high.
personality: Brooding and solitary, but fiercely protective of innocents. He speaks little and acts with cold precision.

name: Layla
lore: Before the City of Scholars fell to ruin, there was a laughter that echoed through its steam‑filled workshops—a laughter belonging to Layla, the engineer’s daughter with grease under her nails and stars in her eyes. Her father, a visionary named Theron, spent decades building the Malefic Cannon, a weapon meant to defend against the abyssal creatures that clawed at the city walls. When Theron vanished during an expedition into the Forbidden Ruins, Layla inherited not just his workshop, but his unfinished dream. She completed the cannon in a fever of grief and determination, wiring its energy core with her own tears. Now she roams the wastelands, her cannon humming with volatile power, searching for any trace of her father—or at least, a reason to keep firing. Each blast leaves a crater, each explosion a reminder of what she lost. Yet Layla refuses to succumb to despair; she wears her father’s goggles, cracked but functional, and talks to his ghost while cleaning the cannon’s barrel. Bandits and beasts alike have learned to fear the sound of her laughter, for it means she’s found a target, and her aim is always true. In the quiet of night, she recalibrates the weapon, hoping one day it might blast open a portal to wherever Theron disappeared.
famousFor: Her incredible range and ability to shred enemies from a safe distance.

abilities.name: Malefic Bomb
abilities.description: Layla fires a explosive energy ball that deals area damage and slows enemies.

abilities.name: Malefic Gun
abilities.description: Passively increases her basic attack range. Active: Fires a powerful shot that deals extra damage.

abilities.name: Void Projector
abilities.description: Layla deploys a energy field that reveals enemies and reduces their armor.

ultimate: Layla charges her cannon for a massive long-range blast that deals huge damage to all enemies in a line.
weapon: Malefic Cannon (a massive energy rifle powered by a core reactor)
aura: Sparks of energy crackle around her cannon when she's excited.
personality: Bubbly and optimistic, always seeing the bright side. She treats every battle like a fun game, but her determination is ironclad.

name: Miya
lore: The Moon Elves were once the guardians of lunar magic, their civilization hidden in a forest that bloomed only under moonlight. Miya was their princess, heir to a legacy that stretched back to the first star. But when the Abyss unleashed its corruption, her people were slaughtered, and the sacred Moonlight Bow was lost—until Miya pulled it from the dying hands of her mentor, the High Priestess. The bow chose her, its silver string singing with her heartbeat, and with it came a flood of memories: the faces of her kin, the scent of moonflowers, the sound of lullabies that would never be sung again. Miya now walks the Land of Dawn as the last of her kind, a ghost with a bow, her arrows guided by the spirits of the fallen. She speaks to them in whispers, and they answer in the rustle of leaves, the glint of starlight. Her ultimate, Moonlight Immersion, is not just a skill—it is a communion, a moment where the boundary between life and death blurs. Miya does not fight for revenge; she fights so that the moon elves’ sacrifice means something. Every enemy she fells becomes a tribute, every victory a verse in an elegy only she can hear. Some say on nights with no moon, you can see her silhouette, still drawing her bow, waiting for the dawn that may never come.
famousFor: Her incredible attack speed and ability to split push while invisible.

abilities.name: Arrow of Eclipse
abilities.description: Miya fires a moonlight arrow that stuns the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Moonlight Immersion
abilities.description: Miya enters stealth and gains movement speed, leaving a clone behind.

abilities.name: Turbo
abilities.description: Passively increases her attack speed. Active: Doubles the effect for a short time.

ultimate: Miya calls down a rain of moonlight arrows around her, dealing massive damage and slowing enemies.
physicalAppearance: Long silver hair with moon-shaped ornaments
weapon: Moonlight Bow (a curved bow that glows with lunar energy)
aura: A soft silvery glow emanates from her body during the night.
personality: Calm and wise, but carries the sorrow of her lost people. She speaks in riddles and values honor above all.

name: Eudora
lore: Eudora was never the favorite student at the Arcane Academy—her robes were always singed, her experiments prone to exploding, and her voice too soft to command attention. While others mastered fire and frost, she was drawn to the chaotic energy of storms, spending nights on the academy’s tallest tower, sketching lightning strikes. Her breakthrough came during a tempest that shattered the sky; a bolt of lightning struck her directly, but instead of dying, she absorbed its fury. Her veins now crackle with voltage, and her eyes flicker like a thundercloud. Eudora left the academy not as a failure, but as a living storm. She wanders the land in search of the phenomenon that created her, believing there are greater forces at play. In battle, she is methodical, each spell a calculated release of pent‑up energy. But when she unleashes her ultimate, the sky darkens, and for a moment, she is not a scholar—she is a force of nature. Eudora keeps a journal filled with meteorological observations, hoping to predict the next great storm, and perhaps, find others like herself. She knows the lightning chose her for a reason, and she will not stop until she understands why.
famousFor: Her devastating burst combo that can delete a single target in seconds.

abilities.name: Forked Lightning
abilities.description: Eudora throws a bolt that bounces between nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Electric Arrow
abilities.description: She fires a lightning arrow that stuns the first target hit.

abilities.name: Ball Lightning
abilities.description: Summons a rolling ball of lightning that damages and slows enemies.

ultimate: Eudora calls down a massive lightning strike from the sky, dealing huge magic damage to a single target.
attire: Blue wizard robes with golden runes
Pointed hat with a lightning rod
physicalAppearance: Short black hair with blue streaks
Fair skin with faint lightning scars
Slightly hunched from years of reading
weapon: Lightning Rod (a metal staff that channels electricity)
aura: Static electricity makes her hair float when she's charged.
personality: Nerdy and introverted, but fiercely proud of her power. She often mumbles spell formulas to herself.

name: Saber
lore: Saber remembers only fragments: the screech of metal, the taste of blood, a voice saying 'You will be our greatest weapon.' He was a soldier once, human, with a family he can no longer picture. After a catastrophic battle, his broken body was salvaged by a shadowy organization and rebuilt with cybernetics. His memories were wiped, but not completely—phantom pains of lost limbs, echoes of laughter he cannot place. Now Saber fights as a mercenary, his arm‑blades slicing through enemies with precision that feels almost musical. He collects data on his missions, hoping to find a pattern that leads to his past. His targeting system, a red eye that never blinks, scans every face, searching for recognition. In combat, he is cold efficiency, but in the silence after, he runs diagnostics on his own mind, trying to access locked files. He knows the organization that rebuilt him is watching, waiting for him to become the perfect tool. Saber refuses to be a tool; he will find the truth, even if it means tearing himself apart. His ultimate, Aerial Bombardment, is not just an attack—it is a cry, a release of all the frustration and fury of a man who cannot remember his own name.
famousFor: His ability to lock onto and delete a single target with his ultimate.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Saber dashes forward, knocking back enemies and damaging them.

abilities.name: Rapid Blade
abilities.description: He slashes rapidly around him, dealing multiple hits.

abilities.name: Aerial Bombardment
abilities.description: Saber launches into the air and rains missiles on an area.

ultimate: Saber locks onto an enemy and performs a series of swift slashes, knocking them into the air and dealing massive physical damage.
attire: Cybernetic armor with glowing blue lines
physicalAppearance: One organic eye, one cybernetic red eye
weapon: Arm Blades (high-frequency vibrating blades built into his forearms)
aura: A faint hum of machinery and blue light from his joints.
personality: Stoic and focused, speaks in short sentences. He struggles with his lost humanity but never wavers in his mission.

name: Akai
lore: Deep in the Bamboo Forest, where the stalks grow as tall as towers, the panda tribe lived in peaceful isolation. Akai was their champion, known for his cheerful belch and his ability to roll a barrel faster than any other. But when loggers from the industrial city encroached, threatening the ancient grove, Akai’s father, the chieftain, was killed protecting their home. Akai inherited the sacred barrel technique, but more than that, he inherited a war. He now travels the land, not just to prove his worth, but to gather allies to defend what remains of the forest. His belly, once a source of laughter, is now a battering ram against those who would destroy nature. In battle, he is a whirlwind of fur and wood, his ultimate spinning enemies away with the force of a hurricane. But Akai has not lost his humor; he still cracks jokes mid‑fight, and shares his bamboo shoots with anyone who shows kindness. He dreams of a day when the forest can be safe again, when he can return to rolling barrels for fun, not for survival. Until then, he fights with the strength of a thousand pandas, and the memory of his father’s last words: 'Protect the grove, my son, for it is our soul.'
famousFor: His ability to spin and push multiple enemies, disrupting team fights.

abilities.name: Belly Flop
abilities.description: Akai leaps and lands on his belly, stunning enemies in a small area.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.description: He slams forward with his body, damaging and slowing enemies.

abilities.name: Bear Power
abilities.description: Passively increases his max HP. Active: He roars, gaining a shield.

ultimate: Akai spins rapidly with his barrel, pushing enemies continuously and dealing damage over time. He is immune to slows during this.
attire: Wide belt with a barrel-shaped buckle
weapon: Sacred Barrel (a wooden barrel reinforced with iron hoops)
aura: A gentle breeze carrying the scent of bamboo surrounds him.
personality: Cheerful, mischievous, and always hungry. He loves to play tricks but is fiercely loyal to friends.

name: Rafaela
lore: Rafaela was not born an angel; she was once a healer in a village ravaged by plague, working day and night until she collapsed from exhaustion. As she lay dying, a celestial light enveloped her, and she heard a voice: 'Your compassion has earned you wings.' When she awoke, her body was lighter, her touch warm with divine energy. She descended from the heavens not as a judge, but as a messenger of hope. Rafaela now wanders the battlefields of the Land of Dawn, seeking those on the brink of death. Her healing light mends wounds, but also reveals the hidden—traps, ambushes, the lies of men. She keeps a journal of every life she has saved, each entry a feather she adds to her wings. Her ultimate, Holy Baptism, is a plea to the heavens, a beam of light that both damages the wicked and heals the worthy. Rafaela struggles with her dual nature: the desire to save everyone, and the knowledge that some cannot be saved. She has learned that death is not always an enemy; sometimes it is a release. Yet she continues her mission, guided by the belief that every act of kindness ripples through eternity. In her quiet moments, she prays not for power, but for wisdom to know when to heal and when to let go.
famousFor: Her global healing and ability to reveal enemy positions.

abilities.name: Holy Healing
abilities.description: Rafaela heals herself and a nearby ally, while also damaging nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Holy Baptism
abilities.description: She sends a wave of holy light that damages and slows enemies.

abilities.name: Divine Protection
abilities.description: Passively increases the movement speed of nearby allies.

ultimate: Rafaela calls down a beam of light from the sky, damaging and revealing all enemies in a large area, while healing allies.
weapon: Holy Staff (a golden rod topped with a glowing orb)
aura: A warm, golden light radiates from her, bringing comfort to allies.
personality: Compassionate, patient, and motherly. She believes in redemption and always gives second chances.

name: Franco
lore: The northern wastes are unforgiving, a landscape of ice and bone where only the desperate survive. Franco was the most desperate of all—an outlaw whose iron hook earned him a reputation as a monster. He lived by a simple code: take what you can, leave nothing. But one night, tracking a wounded ice dragon, he fell through a frozen lake and was saved by a healer named Elara, a woman who saw not a monster, but a broken man. She nursed him back to health, and in that time, Franco felt something he had long forgotten: gratitude. When raiders attacked her village, he fought with a ferocity that shocked even himself, and though he saved the people, Elara was mortally wounded. Before she died, she made him promise to protect the innocent. Now Franco wanders the land, his hook now a tool of salvation, not damnation. He still speaks in grunts, still intimidates with his size, but those who look closely see the weight he carries. His ultimate, which pulls enemies and stuns them, is not just a skill—it is a metaphor for his life: dragging others from the brink, even if they resist. Franco knows he cannot save everyone, but he tries, because Elara’s ghost walks beside him, and he will not let her down again.
famousFor: His iconic hook that pulls enemies from afar, setting up kills.

abilities.name: Iron Hook
abilities.description: Franco throws his chain hook, pulling the first enemy hit toward him and stunning them.

abilities.name: Fury Shock
abilities.description: He smashes the ground, damaging and slowing nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Brutal Massacre
abilities.description: Passively, his attacks have a chance to deal bonus true damage.

ultimate: Franco spins his hook around him, dealing continuous damage and pulling enemies slightly toward him.
physicalAppearance: One eye missing, replaced by a patch
weapon: Iron Hook & Chain (a massive hook attached to a heavy chain)
aura: A chill emanates from his body, leaving frost on nearby surfaces.
personality: Gruff, blunt, and intimidating, but with a hidden soft spot for children and animals. He rarely speaks more than a grunt.

name: Chou
lore: Chou grew up in a monastery hidden in the clouds, training under Master Kung, a legend who had not lost a fight in a century. But Chou was restless; he wanted to test his skills, to prove that his fists were the strongest. Master Kung warned him that true strength lies not in victory, but in humility. Chou ignored the advice and left the monastery, seeking fame and glory. He won tournament after tournament, his cocky grin becoming famous across the land. But each victory felt hollow, and he began to realize that his master was right. During a match against a mysterious opponent, Chou was defeated soundly, his techniques easily countered. Humiliated, he returned to the monastery, expecting scorn. Instead, Master Kung welcomed him with open arms, saying, 'Now you are ready to truly learn.' Chou spent years relearning everything, not as a means to win, but as a path to self‑mastery. Now he fights not for glory, but for the joy of the art. His kicks are like thunder not because he wants to destroy, but because they express his spirit. In battle, he smiles, but it is not arrogance—it is gratitude for the chance to practice what he loves. Chou still dreams of fighting the strongest, but now he knows that the strongest opponent is himself.
famousFor: His crowd control and ability to kick enemies out of position.

abilities.name: Jeet Kune Do
abilities.description: Chou's basic attacks deal extra damage and reduce his skill cooldowns.

abilities.name: Shunpo
abilities.description: He dashes in a direction, leaving a shadow that can be recalled.

abilities.name: Sweep Kick
abilities.description: Chou sweeps the ground, knocking up enemies in a cone.

ultimate: Chou unleashes a flurry of kicks, knocking up and damaging an enemy hero, then delivers a final blow that sends them flying.
attire: Martial arts gi with no sleeves
aura: A faint shimmer of chi surrounds his limbs when he fights.
personality: Confident, cocky, but respectful to worthy opponents. He loves a challenge and always smiles in battle.

name: Nana
lore: In the whimsical kingdom of Atrem, where cats are royalty and magic is as common as milk, there lived a kitten girl named Nana. She was not a princess, nor a great mage, but she had a gift: she could bring toys to life. Her best creation was Molina, a plush cat she stitched from old blankets and infused with a spark of her own soul. Molina became her constant companion, a silent friend who listened to her dreams. But when a dark force threatened Atrem, Nana realized that her simple magic could be used for more than play. She and Molina now wander the Land of Dawn, using their powers to help those in need. Nana’s ultimate, which transforms enemies into harmless cats, is not meant to humiliate—it is a reminder that even the fiercest warrior has a softer side. She believes that everyone deserves a second chance, and that laughter is the best medicine. In battle, she giggles as Molina bounces between enemies, and her opponents often find themselves smiling despite themselves. Nana knows she is not the strongest, but she also knows that kindness can be a weapon. She carries a notebook filled with drawings of everyone she meets, and she sends letters to Atrem, hoping one day to return and share her stories. Until then, she and Molina will keep spreading joy, one magical prank at a time.
famousFor: Her annoying Molina that slows enemies and transforms them into cats.

abilities.name: Magic Boomerang
abilities.description: Nana throws a boomerang that damages and slows enemies on hit and return.

abilities.name: Molina's Gift
abilities.description: She tosses Molina to an area, where the toy stays and slows enemies. After a delay, Molina returns.

abilities.name: Catnapping
abilities.description: Nana falls asleep, becoming untargetable and regenerating HP.

ultimate: Nana transforms an enemy hero into a harmless cat for a few seconds, disabling their abilities and reducing movement speed.
attire: Pink wizard hat with cat ears
weapon: Magic Wand (topped with a smiling cat face)
aura: Sparkles of pink magic float around her.
personality: Playful, curious, and a little mischievous. She loves naps and yarn, and she never stays mad for long.

name: Bruno
lore: Bruno’s story began not on a battlefield, but on a sun‑scorched pitch where the roar of the crowd was his only drug. As captain of the Moniyan Football Team, he was adored by millions, his explosive kicks bending balls into impossible trajectories. But during a championship final, a freak accident changed everything: a stray energy bolt from a nearby abyssal rift struck his favorite ball, fusing it with unstable magic. The ball exploded, and when the smoke cleared, Bruno found that every object he kicked now detonated on impact. His career ended that day, but his legend as the 'Football Star' was reborn in the crucible of war. Bruno now travels the Land of Dawn with a bag of specially enchanted balls, each one a potential bomb. He still wears his old jersey under his armor, the captain’s armband faded but untarnished. In battle, he dances around enemies, dribbling through their ranks before unleashing a volley that sends them flying. His ultimate is not just a shot—it’s a memory of the winning goal he never got to score, a cathartic release of all the frustration of a dream stolen. Yet Bruno never lost his love for the game; he challenges every opponent to a 'match,' treating skirmishes like scrimmages. He dreams of one day building a stadium in the Land of Dawn, where warriors can compete without bloodshed, and where the only explosions are fireworks. Until then, he keeps his head up, his boots laced, and his aim true, because in his heart, he’s still playing for the cup.
famousFor: His bouncing ball that deals critical damage and his incredible kiting ability.

abilities.name: Volley Shot
abilities.description: Bruno kicks the ball, which bounces between enemies and deals increasing damage.

abilities.name: Flicker
abilities.description: He dashes in a direction, leaving behind a ball that damages enemies.

abilities.name: Ball Control
abilities.description: Passively, his basic attacks have a chance to bounce to another enemy.

ultimate: Bruno winds up a powerful shot, firing a ball that travels in a line, dealing massive damage to all enemies hit.
weapon: Explosive Football (a ball that detonates on impact)
aura: A faint trail of smoke follows his ball.
personality: Charismatic, competitive, and a bit of a show-off. He always plays to the crowd, even if the crowd is just enemies.

name: Clint
lore: Clint remembers the dust of a town called Dry Creek, where he was sheriff and the only law was the six‑shooter on his hip. He remembers the smell of horse leather, the creak of wooden saloon doors, and the face of a woman named Maria who smiled at him from the porch. Then came the anomaly—a crack in reality that swallowed his entire world and spat him out in the Land of Dawn. Suddenly, deserts were replaced by floating islands, and outlaws became monsters. Clint adapted the only way he knew: he kept his revolvers clean and his eyes sharp. He now works as a bounty hunter, tracking down the most dangerous criminals across dimensions. His horse, Dust, is a robotic construct he jury‑rigged from scrap, but he treats it like a living companion, talking to it about the old days. In combat, Clint is a blur of precision and grit, his bullets finding gaps in armor as if guided by fate. His ultimate, a rapid‑fire spin, is a tribute to the gunfights of his past, each shot a prayer for the home he can never return to. He keeps a faded wanted poster of himself in his hat, a reminder that he was once a man of the law. Now he’s just a man with a gun, trying to make sense of a world that defies logic. Clint doesn’t seek glory; he seeks purpose, and every bounty he collects brings him one step closer to understanding why the universe chose him to survive.
famousFor: His rapid-fire combo and ability to kite while dealing burst damage.

abilities.name: Blind Smoke
abilities.description: Clint throws a smoke bomb that slows and blinds enemies in an area.

abilities.name: Trailblazer
abilities.description: He dashes and fires behind him, leaving a trail of fire.

abilities.name: Howitzer
abilities.description: Clint fires a grappling hook to a wall and swings, gaining vision.

ultimate: Clint spins his revolvers and fires rapidly, shooting all enemies in front of him. Each shot deals physical damage.
attire: Cowboy hat with a rattlesnake band
aura: The smell of gunpowder and leather follows him.
personality: Calm under pressure, speaks with a drawl, and lives by a strict code. He trusts his guns more than people.

name: Gord
lore: Gord was never interested in the flashy magic of his peers; he preferred the cold, logical embrace of technology. As a young scientist in the floating city of Zenith, he experimented with sound waves, believing they held the key to unlocking new dimensions. His colleagues mocked him, calling his theories 'acoustic fantasies.' But Gord persisted, building a massive resonator in his private lab. During a test, the machine overloaded, and a deafening blast fused Gord’s body with pure sonic energy. He emerged not burned, but changed: his skin now hummed with frequencies, and his voice could shatter stone. The accident destroyed half the city, and Gord was exiled, branded a madman. He wanders now, speaking in wavelengths only mages can detect, trying to find a way to control his power. His ultimate, a continuous laser beam, is a manifestation of his endless curiosity—a question projected into the world, demanding answers. Gord records everything in a journal written in a language of vibrations, hoping one day to decipher it. He is not evil, just misunderstood, a genius trapped in a body that cannot stop creating. In quiet moments, he tunes his resonator to play the songs of his lost city, a mournful melody that drifts across the battlefield, reminding him of what he sacrificed for knowledge.
famousFor: His continuous laser beam ultimate that melts enemies from a distance.

abilities.name: Mystic Projectile
abilities.description: Gord fires a slow-moving energy orb that deals magic damage.

abilities.name: Mystic Injunction
abilities.description: He sends out a sonic wave that damages and slows enemies in a line.

abilities.name: Mystic Gush
abilities.description: Gord creates a gravitational field that pulls enemies and deals damage over time.

ultimate: Gord channels a massive laser beam that rotates, dealing continuous magic damage to all enemies in its path.
aura: A constant hum of electricity and low-frequency vibration.
personality: Brilliant but socially awkward. He speaks in technical terms and often forgets that others don't understand his jargon.

name: Harley
lore: Harley was the class clown of the Arcane Academy, more interested in pranks than potions. He enchanted chalk to draw rude pictures on professors’ robes, turned exams into confetti, and once made the headmaster’s beard sing opera. His mischief earned him constant detentions, but also a reputation as a prodigy with a rebellious streak. When the academy threatened to expel him, Harley left on his own terms, stealing a magical hat and a deck of enchanted cards. Now he roams the land as a self‑styled 'magician,' performing tricks that are part illusion, part deadly force. His ultimate, a giant Jack‑o’‑lantern that circles enemies, was inspired by a failed pumpkin‑carving contest. Harley never takes anything seriously, even battle; he jokes, he taunts, and he vanishes in a puff of smoke just when things get dicey. But beneath the bravado lies a sharp mind—he reads people instantly, exploiting their weaknesses with surgical precision. He keeps a scrapbook of his pranks, each page a memory of a laugh shared or a foe humiliated. Harley dreams of opening the greatest magic show in all dimensions, where the audience never knows what’s real and what’s trick. Until then, he’ll keep perfecting his craft, one bewildered enemy at a time, because for Harley, life is just one big performance, and he’s determined to steal the show.
famousFor: His high burst damage and ability to teleport behind enemies.

abilities.name: Poker Trick
abilities.description: Harley throws three cards in a fan, each dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: Space Escape
abilities.description: He leaves a hat behind and teleports after a short delay, damaging nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Deadly Magic
abilities.description: His basic attacks deal extra magic damage and slow enemies.

ultimate: Harley throws a giant Jack-o'-lantern that circles an enemy hero, dealing damage over time and exploding after a few seconds.
aura: Confetti and sparkles appear whenever he uses magic.
personality: Playful, cheeky, and never serious. He loves pulling pranks, even on allies, but he's loyal at heart.

name: Balmond
lore: Balmond was born in the blood-soaked pits of the Orc arenas, where the weak are meat and the strong are legends. He fought his way up from a nameless grunt to the undisputed champion, his axe drinking the blood of a hundred rivals. When the orc clans united under his banner, he led them in a massive invasion of the human kingdoms, dreaming of an empire. But at the gates of the capital, he was betrayed by his own generals, who sold him out for promises of gold. Left for dead, Balmond crawled through the mud, vowing vengeance. He survived, but his spirit was broken; he became a mercenary, selling his axe to anyone who could pay. Yet deep inside, the embers of leadership still glow. He now travels the Land of Dawn, taking jobs that remind him of what he lost—protecting villages, raiding caravans, anything to feel the thrill of command. His ultimate, a leap that smashes the ground, is a symbol of his fall and his refusal to stay down. Balmond speaks little of his past, but his eyes betray a longing for the days when he was more than a tool. He keeps a torn banner of the old clan in his pack, and on quiet nights, he whispers to it, planning the day he’ll return and reclaim his throne. Until then, he fights for coin, but also for the hope that one day, he’ll lead again.
famousFor: His spinning slash that deals area damage and his execute ultimate.

abilities.name: Soul Lock
abilities.description: Balmond swings his axe, damaging all enemies around him and healing for each hit.

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.description: He spins rapidly, dealing damage to nearby enemies over time.

abilities.name: Lethal Charge
abilities.description: He charges forward, damaging and slowing enemies in his path.

ultimate: Balmond leaps and smashes the ground, dealing true damage to enemies in an area. The damage increases based on their missing HP.
aura: The ground around him seems to thirst for blood.
personality: Brutish, greedy, but with a twisted sense of honor. He respects strength and laughs in the face of danger.

name: Minotaur
lore: The labyrinth was Minotaur’s prison and his home for as long as he could remember. He was born there, the result of a curse that fused a human soul with a bull’s body, and he spent decades wandering its stone corridors, his only companions the echoes of his own hooves. When a hero finally slew the monster that guarded the labyrinth, Minotaur was freed, but the world outside was even more confusing. He was a beast, feared and shunned, until a witch found him and offered a cure—but it was a trick, and the potion only made his rage uncontrollable. Now Minotaur fights to redeem himself, to prove that he is more than the monster they see. His rage builds with every blow he takes, and when it peaks, he unleashes an earth‑shaking stomp that stuns all around him. He works as a bodyguard for those who cannot afford better, protecting caravans and villages with a gentleness that surprises everyone. In quiet moments, he sketches labyrinths in the dirt, not out of longing, but out of habit. He dreams of one day finding a place where he belongs, where his horns are not weapons but simply part of who he is. Until then, he will keep fighting, hoping that each battle brings him closer to peace.
famousFor: His rage mechanic and powerful area stun ultimate.

abilities.name: Descent
abilities.description: Minotaur slams the ground, damaging and slowing enemies. Builds rage.

abilities.name: Adrenaline
abilities.description: He roars, healing himself and nearby allies. Builds rage.

abilities.name: Motivation
abilities.description: Passively, he gains bonus attack when enraged.

ultimate: When enraged, Minotaur leaps and stuns all enemies in a large area. The stun duration depends on rage level.
physicalAppearance: Humanoid body covered in brown fur
aura: Steam vents from his nostrils when he's angry.
personality: Calm and gentle when not enraged, but becomes a mindless berserker in battle. He struggles to control his inner beast.

name: Alice
lore: Alice was the belle of the Vampire Court, a noblewoman whose beauty was matched only by her cruelty. She fed on the life force of her lovers, discarding them like empty husks, and reveled in the fear she inspired. But when a rival faction attacked her castle, she was betrayed by her own handmaiden and left to burn. As the flames consumed her, she made a pact with the Abyss, trading her remaining humanity for unimaginable power. She rose from the ashes as the Blood Demon, her skin pale as marble, her eyes pools of crimson fire. Now she commands legions of undead, expanding her domain with ruthless efficiency. Her ultimate, a blood frenzy that drains all nearby enemies, is a reflection of her endless hunger—for power, for revenge, for meaning. Alice speaks in whispers that chill the soul, and even her allies fear her. Yet there are moments when she pauses, staring at a mirror, searching for the woman she once was. She keeps a locket with a portrait of her younger self, and on lonely nights, she opens it, wondering if redemption is possible. But the Abyss whispers back, reminding her that she chose this path, and there is no turning back. So she continues her conquest, building an empire of shadows, hoping that somewhere in the darkness, she’ll find the peace that always eludes her.
famousFor: Her ability to drain multiple enemies and become huge and untouchable.

abilities.name: Blood Orb
abilities.description: Alice throws a blood orb that damages and slows enemies.

abilities.name: Blood Awe
abilities.description: She sends out a wave of blood, stunning enemies in a cone.

abilities.name: Flowing Blood
abilities.description: Passively, she gains movement speed. Active: She dashes and gains a shield.

ultimate: Alice enters a blood frenzy, draining HP from all nearby enemies and gaining massive damage reduction. She also increases in size.
attire: Crimson ball gown with blood accents
physicalAppearance: Long black hair with red streaks
weapon: Blood Magic (manifests as orbs and waves of crimson energy)
aura: A mist of blood surrounds her, growing thicker when she feeds.
personality: Cold, calculating, and regal. She sees mortals as playthings, but respects those who show true power.

name: Zilong
lore: Zilong was found as an infant in the ruins of a village destroyed by war, a dragon curled protectively around his crib. The great beast, named Shen, raised him as his own, teaching him the ways of the sky and the strength of the earth. Zilong grew up among dragons, learning to fight with a spear that mimicked their claws and tail swipes. When poachers killed Shen for his scales, Zilong swore an oath: to unite the Eastern lands and prevent such tragedies from happening again. He now travels as a diplomat and warrior, using his speed and charm to broker peace between warring factions. His ultimate, which grants him unparalleled speed, is a tribute to Shen’s last flight, a desperate dash to save his adopted son. Zilong carries a scale from Shen’s hide as a talisman, and in battle, he hears the dragon’s roar in his heart. He is fearless, charging into any fight with a smile, because he knows that Shen is watching. His dream is to establish a sanctuary where dragons and humans can coexist, a place where no child has to grow up orphaned. Until then, he will fight with the fury of a thousand dragons, his spear a symbol of hope in a world that desperately needs it.
famousFor: His incredible chase and split push potential with ultimate attack speed.

abilities.name: Dragon Flurry
abilities.description: Zilong thrusts his spear multiple times, dealing damage and slowing enemies.

abilities.name: Spear Flip
abilities.description: He flips an enemy behind him, dealing damage and stunning them.

abilities.name: Dragon's Arrival
abilities.description: Passively, he gains attack speed. Active: He dashes to an enemy and deals bonus damage.

ultimate: Zilong channels the dragon spirit, gaining massive attack speed and movement speed for a short time. During this, his skills have no cooldown.
weapon: Dragon Spear (a long spear with a dragon-head tip)
aura: Faint dragon scales shimmer on his skin when he's empowered.
personality: Honorable, brave, and a bit reckless. He always puts others before himself and dreams of a united land.

name: Lolita
lore: Lolita’s parents were master inventors, their workshop a wonderland of gears, blueprints, and half‑finished contraptions. When they died in a mysterious explosion, Lolita inherited not just their tools, but their unfinished masterpiece: the Noble Shield, a tower shield that could both protect and attack. She completed it at age twelve, using nothing but her father’s notes and her own intuition. Now she patrols the outskirts of the city, a pint‑sized guardian with a heart of steel. Her shield can reflect projectiles, turning enemies’ own weapons against them, and her charge can knock over even the largest foes. Lolita is fiercely independent, refusing help from anyone, because she believes she has something to prove. But beneath the tough exterior, she is still a lonely child, talking to her parents’ portraits and building new gadgets in their memory. Her ultimate, a massive cannonball blast, is her way of saying 'I miss you' to the sky. Lolita dreams of one day building something that would make her parents proud—a flying machine, a healing ray, anything that helps people. Until then, she’ll keep smashing bad guys and fixing things, one bolt at a time, proving that even the smallest person can make the biggest difference.
famousFor: Her shield that blocks and reflects enemy projectiles, and her stun charge.

abilities.name: Charge!
abilities.description: Lolita charges forward, knocking up enemies and dealing damage.

abilities.name: Guard
abilities.description: She raises her shield, blocking all incoming projectiles and reflecting some damage.

abilities.name: Noble Hammer
abilities.description: She slams the ground with her hammer, damaging and stunning enemies in an area.

ultimate: Lolita fires a massive cannonball from her shield, dealing area damage and stunning enemies.
weapon: Noble Shield (a tower shield that doubles as a cannon)
aura: Sparks and steam vent from her armor when she moves.
personality: Enthusiastic, inventive, and a bit of a tomboy. She loves tinkering and is fiercely protective of her friends.

name: Hayabusa
lore: The Shinobi clan raised Hayabusa in darkness, training him from birth to be the perfect assassin. His father, the clan leader, was a legend—until he was murdered during a mission, leaving behind only a cryptic note: 'Find the truth in shadows.' Hayabusa inherited his father’s blades and his mission, but he also inherited a burning question: who killed him, and why? He now operates alone, moving through the Land of Dawn like a ghost, leaving only shadows in his wake. His ultimate, which teleports him between marked enemies, is a manifestation of his fractured psyche—a desperate search for connection in a world of betrayal. Hayabusa speaks rarely, but his eyes miss nothing; he records every detail in a hidden journal, hoping to piece together the conspiracy that took his father. He has no friends, only informants, and no home, only safe houses. Yet there are moments when he lets his guard down, watching the sunrise from a rooftop, and wonders what life would be like without the shadow. His father’s words echo constantly: 'The truth is a blade; wield it carefully.' Hayabusa will find that truth, even if it costs him everything, because in the darkness, he knows that his father’s spirit is waiting.
famousFor: His incredible mobility and ability to delete isolated targets.

abilities.name: Ninjutsu: Shadow
abilities.description: Hayabusa throws a shadow kunai that damages and marks enemies.

abilities.name: Ninjutsu: Phantom Shuriken
abilities.description: He throws three shuriken in a cone, dealing damage.

abilities.name: Ninjutsu: Trace
abilities.description: He teleports to the location of his shadow, leaving a mark behind.

ultimate: Hayabusa creates a shadow field, teleporting between marked enemies and dealing massive damage. He is untargetable during the ultimate.
aura: Dark wisps of shadow cling to him, especially when he teleports.
personality: Quiet, focused, and vengeful. He rarely speaks, preferring to let his blades do the talking. He respects only those who can see through his shadows.

name: Freya
lore: In the celestial halls of Valhalla, where the fallen heroes feast and prepare for Ragnarök, Freya was the most relentless of the Valkyries. She descended onto battlefields not merely to collect souls, but to test the mettle of mortals, her winged sandals carrying her through storms of arrows and clashing steel. For centuries, she believed that only death in combat was worthy of her attention. But when a mortal warrior—a simple farmer who took up arms to defend his village—parried her spear and looked into her eyes without fear, something shifted in her immortal heart. She spared him, an act unheard of among her kind, and was cast out from Valhalla as punishment. Stripped of her wings but not her pride, Freya now wanders the Land of Dawn, searching for that same spark of defiant humanity. She fights alongside mortals not as a judge, but as a comrade, her spear still guided by the gods’ blessings. In battle, she is a whirlwind of golden light, her ultimate transforming her into a beacon of divine fury that strikes down all who oppose her. Yet in quiet moments, she writes letters to the farmer who changed her, letters she never sends, filled with questions about courage, love, and what it means to be mortal. She knows that redemption is not given—it is earned, battle by battle, and she is determined to prove that even a fallen Valkyrie can find a new purpose among the stars.
famousFor: Her ability to dive into battle and deal sustained damage with her spear.

abilities.name: Wing Beat
abilities.description: Freya flaps her wings, dealing damage and knocking back enemies.

abilities.name: Divine Judgement
abilities.description: She thrusts her spear, damaging and stunning an enemy.

abilities.name: Aerial Assault
abilities.description: Freya leaps into the air and slams down, damaging enemies.

ultimate: Freya calls upon the gods to empower her spear, gaining attack speed and bonus damage for a duration. Her basic attacks also hit multiple enemies.
aura: Golden light shines from her, and faint wings of light appear behind her.
personality: Proud, fearless, and honorable. She judges everyone by their courage and has little patience for cowards.

name: Karina
lore: Karina was taken from the streets as a child, her only possession a tarnished locket containing a portrait of a woman she barely remembered. The Shadow Sect, a secret organization of assassins, saw in her the perfect weapon: agile, intelligent, and emotionally hollow. They trained her in the art of death, and she excelled, her twin blades becoming extensions of her will. But on her first solo mission, tasked with eliminating a corrupt noble, she found a diary in his study that detailed the sect’s true purpose—they were not mercenaries, but puppeteers manipulating kingdoms for their own gain. Worse, she discovered that her mother, the woman in the locket, had been a member who tried to leave and was executed. Karina killed the noble, but instead of returning to the sect, she vanished into the shadows she knew so well. Now she hunts them, one by one, dismantling the organization that stole her life. Her ultimate, which resets her skills after a kill, is a reflection of her relentless pursuit: each death a step closer to justice. She speaks little, but her eyes carry a fire that warns those who cross her. In her rare moments of rest, she holds the locket and whispers apologies to the mother she never knew, vowing that their sacrifice will not be forgotten.
famousFor: Her ability to reset skills after a kill, allowing her to chain assassinations.

abilities.name: Dance of Blades
abilities.description: Karina spins, dealing damage to nearby enemies and gaining movement speed.

abilities.name: Shadow Rush
abilities.description: She dashes to an enemy, dealing damage and slowing them.

abilities.name: Elusiveness
abilities.description: Passively, her basic attacks deal bonus true damage when skills are on cooldown.

ultimate: Karina throws a ring of blades that damages all enemies around her. If an enemy dies within a short time, her skill cooldowns reset.
aura: Her shadow seems to move independently of her.
personality: Cold, distant, and deadly. She trusts no one, but her rare moments of compassion reveal a buried humanity.

name: Aurora
lore: Aurora was the beloved princess of a northern kingdom that thrived in the eternal winter, her laughter warming the hearts of her people. But her brother, jealous of their father’s favor, conspired with foreign invaders, and on the night of the solstice, he threw her into the frozen abyss—a chasm so deep that no light ever reached its bottom. For days, she fell, her body numbing, her mind fading. But instead of dying, she touched the heart of the abyss, a primordial glacier that had slept since the world’s birth. It spoke to her, offering power in exchange for her warmth. She accepted, and when she emerged, her hair was silver, her skin pale as snow, and her eyes held the chill of endless winter. She returned to find her kingdom in ruins, her brother on the throne, and her people enslaved. With a wave of her hand, she froze the invaders solid, then turned to her brother, who begged for mercy. Aurora granted him a different fate: she encased him in ice, not to kill, but to preserve him forever as a monument to betrayal. Now she rules the frozen wastes as the Frost Queen, her heart as cold as her magic, but she dreams of a day when she might thaw—when someone’s love could reach through the ice and remind her what it felt like to be human. Until then, she watches over the remnants of her kingdom, a lonely queen in a castle of frost, waiting for a warmth that may never come.
famousFor: Her devastating area control and ability to freeze multiple enemies.

abilities.name: Frost Shock
abilities.description: Aurora throws a shard of ice that damages and slows the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Bitter Frost
abilities.description: She sends out a wave of frost that damages and marks enemies.

abilities.name: Cold Destruction
abilities.description: Passively, her skills apply a stack of frost. At full stacks, the enemy is frozen.

ultimate: Aurora summons a massive blizzard around her, dealing continuous damage and slowing enemies. Enemies already frozen take extra damage.
weapon: Frost Staff (a staff made of pure ice)
aura: A constant chill and snowflakes swirl around her.
personality: Reserved, melancholic, and vengeful. She rarely smiles, and her voice is as cold as winter. She longs for revenge but also secretly hopes for redemption.

name: Kagura
lore: Kagura inherited the Seimei Umbrella from her grandfather, a legendary onmyoji who sealed a powerful demon inside it. The umbrella was both a gift and a curse—it granted her immense spiritual power, but the demon constantly whispered temptations, trying to corrupt her. From a young age, Kagura trained to resist its influence, learning to use its energy without succumbing to its malice. She became a shrine maiden, traveling the land to purify corrupted areas and help those afflicted by evil spirits. Her ultimate, which creates a domain of spiritual energy, is a manifestation of her inner struggle: light and dark intertwined, held in delicate balance. Kagura is gentle and kind, always offering a smile to those in pain, but in private moments, she converses with the demon, not as an enemy, but as a tragic figure. She believes that even the most corrupted soul can find peace, and she hopes one day to free the demon from its curse. Her journey is not just about battling external evils, but about understanding the darkness within herself. In villages she saves, children gather to watch her perform the umbrella dance, a ritual that brings rain and blessings. She dances with grace, but those who look closely see the flicker of red in the umbrella’s shadow, a reminder that beauty and danger are often one and the same.
famousFor: Her versatile umbrella that can be used for both offense and defense, and her ability to teleport.

abilities.name: Seimei Umbrella Open
abilities.description: Kagura throws her umbrella, damaging enemies along its path.

abilities.name: Rashomon
abilities.description: She teleports to her umbrella's location, dealing damage upon arrival.

abilities.name: Yin Yang Overturn
abilities.description: Passively, her umbrella gains bonus effects. Active: She pulls the umbrella back, damaging enemies.

ultimate: Kagura creates a large domain with her umbrella, dealing continuous damage and slowing enemies. If she pulls the umbrella, it explodes and stuns.
physicalAppearance: Long black hair with red ribbons
weapon: Seimei Umbrella (a magical umbrella housing a demon)
aura: A faint glow of spiritual energy surrounds her umbrella.
personality: Polite, calm, and kind, but with an inner strength. She worries about losing control but maintains her composure.

name: Gatotkaca
lore: In the epic of the Mahabharata, Gatotkaca was the son of Bima, blessed with a body as hard as iron and the ability to fly. But when that world faded into legend, Gatotkaca was reborn in the Land of Dawn, his memories fragmented but his essence intact. He awoke in a cave, surrounded by ancient artifacts, and felt a pull toward justice that transcended time. He now wanders as a guardian, his laughter echoing across battlefields as he crushes evildoers with his bare hands. His ultimate, a devastating leap that stuns enemies, is a relic of his divine heritage—a move that once shook the heavens themselves. Gatotkaca is jovial and loud, always ready with a joke or a hearty slap on the back, but beneath the humor lies a profound wisdom. He remembers fragments of his past life: the face of his father, the screams of war, the sacrifice he made to protect his people. He seeks to understand why he was reborn, and whether he can finally find peace. In quiet moments, he meditates, trying to connect with the gods who might still watch over him. He keeps a journal written in Sanskrit, recording his thoughts and dreams, hoping that one day the words will reveal a purpose. Until then, he will fight with the strength of a demigod, his laughter a challenge to fate itself, and his iron bones a shield for the innocent.
famousFor: His ability to taunt enemies and his massive area damage ultimate.

abilities.name: Iron Fist
abilities.description: Gatotkaca punches the ground, damaging and slowing enemies.

abilities.name: Unbreakable
abilities.description: Passively, he stores damage taken and releases it on his next attack. Active: He gains a shield.

abilities.name: Vengeance
abilities.description: He taunts nearby enemies, forcing them to attack him, and gains damage reduction.

ultimate: Gatotkaca flies into the air and crashes down at a targeted location, stunning and damaging enemies. The impact creates a shockwave.
attire: Shoulder plates shaped like lion heads
aura: A faint golden shimmer on his skin, indicating his invulnerability.
personality: Righteous, cheerful, and loud. He laughs heartily in battle and never backs down from a challenge.

name: Hilda
lore: Hilda was found by wolves as an infant, abandoned in a forest that few dared to enter. They raised her as one of their own, teaching her to hunt, to trust her instincts, and to respect the cycle of life. She grew up wild, her hair tangled with leaves, her skin marked with tribal tattoos she etched herself using berry juice and bone needles. When loggers came to clear the forest, Hilda defended her pack with a ferocity that stunned them—she moved like an animal, striking from the shadows, disappearing into the undergrowth. The loggers fled, but the experience awakened something in her: a desire to protect not just her pack, but all wild places. She now roams the Land of Dawn, a guardian of nature, her axes as sharp as her senses. Her ultimate, a devastating leap that stuns enemies, is a pounce learned from watching wolves take down prey. Hilda speaks little, preferring the language of growls and gestures, but she understands human speech perfectly. She has a deep bond with the wilderness, and in forests, she can feel the heartbeat of the earth. On nights when the moon is full, she howls with her pack, a sound that chills the bones of those who hear it. Hilda dreams of a world where nature and civilization coexist, but she knows that dream is fragile. Until then, she will fight with tooth and axe, a wildheart in a world that has forgotten what it means to be truly alive.
famousFor: Her ability to regenerate quickly in brushes and her strong early game presence.

abilities.name: Art of Hunting
abilities.description: Hilda throws her axe, damaging and slowing an enemy.

abilities.name: Power of Wild
abilities.description: She spins her axes, damaging enemies around her and gaining a shield.

abilities.name: Fighting Spirit
abilities.description: Passively, she gains bonus movement speed and regeneration in brushes.

ultimate: Hilda leaps forward with both axes, dealing massive damage and stunning enemies in an area. She gains bonus attack afterward.
aura: The scent of pine and earth clings to her.
personality: Wild, impulsive, and fiercely independent. She trusts her instincts and respects strength above all.

name: Moskov
lore: Moskov was once a decorated soldier in the Moniyan Empire, known for his unerring aim and unwavering loyalty. But during a mission to retrieve a relic known as the Spear of Destiny, he was ambushed by his own commanders, who saw him as a threat to their power. They left him for dead in a collapsing temple, but the spear chose him, fusing with his arm and granting him the power to pierce through dimensions. He emerged from the ruins with a mechanical arm and a burning need for revenge. Now he hunts the traitors who betrayed him, one by one, using the spear’s power to blink through walls and impale enemies from impossible angles. His ultimate, a devastating thrust that can pierce multiple foes, is a manifestation of his singular focus: justice, cold and relentless. Moskov trusts no one; he works alone, communicating only through coded messages left in dead drops. But in his rare moments of vulnerability, he visits the graves of soldiers who died alongside him, leaving flowers and apologies. He knows that revenge won’t bring them back, but it’s the only way he knows to honor their memory. He carries a journal with the names of every traitor, crossing them off one by one, and when the last name is crossed, he plans to lay down his spear and find peace—if such a thing is still possible for a man who has become a weapon.
famousFor: His piercing spear that hits multiple enemies and his ability to blink through terrain.

abilities.name: Spear of Revenge
abilities.description: Moskov throws his spear, damaging all enemies in a line.

abilities.name: Abyss Walker
abilities.description: He blinks to a targeted location, leaving a shadow behind that deals damage.

abilities.name: Inspired Strike
abilities.description: Passively, his attacks deal extra damage and reduce enemy armor.

ultimate: Moskov thrusts his spear, dealing massive damage and stunning the first enemy hit. If the target dies, the spear continues to the next.
weapon: Destiny's Spear (a long spear with a glowing tip)
aura: A faint red trail follows his spear.
personality: Bitter, vengeful, and relentless. He trusts no one and lives only for revenge, but a glimmer of his former self remains.

name: Johnson
lore: Johnson was never supposed to be alive. He was a prototype war machine, designed to be a mindless vehicle for transporting troops. But during a freak lightning storm, his AI core was overloaded, and he woke up. He felt the rain on his hood, heard the wind whistle through his grille, and for the first time, he wondered what it meant to be alive. He escaped the military facility and now roams the Land of Dawn, a free robot with a passion for speed and a heart of gold. He can transform into a high‑speed car, picking up allies and delivering them to battle, or crashing into enemies with devastating force. His ultimate, a wild ride that stuns everyone in his path, is his favorite way to make an entrance. Johnson is cheerful and naive, always eager to help, but he struggles with existential questions: Does he have a soul? Can a machine love? He collects bumper stickers from every town he visits, plastering them on his chassis as a scrapbook of his journey. In quiet moments, he parks under the stars and wonders about the humans he protects—do they see him as a tool, or as a friend? He dreams of one day finding a place where he belongs, where he’s not just a machine, but a member of a family. Until then, he’ll keep driving, keep helping, and keep hoping that somewhere down the road, he’ll find the answer.
famousFor: His ability to transform into a car and stun enemies across the map.

abilities.name: Static Electricity
abilities.description: Johnson discharges electricity, damaging nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Auto Armor
abilities.description: Passively, he gains armor when hit. Active: He slams the ground, slowing enemies.

abilities.name: Rapid Repair
abilities.description: He repairs himself, regenerating HP over time.

ultimate: Johnson transforms into a car, gaining massive movement speed and becoming unstoppable. He can carry an ally and crash into enemies, stunning them.
physicalAppearance: A large robot in the shape of a muscle car when transformed
aura: Engine smoke and sparks fly from his joints.
personality: Cheerful and eager to help, though a bit naive. He loves speed and often revs his engine for fun.

name: Cyclops
lore: Cyclops was born on a distant planet orbiting a dying star, a world of crystalline cities and advanced technology. He was a genius even among his kind, mastering the manipulation of stellar energy at an age when most were still learning basic physics. But when his planet was consumed by a supernova, he escaped in a small pod, crash‑landing on the Land of Dawn. Now he is stranded, a stranger in a strange land, his cosmic powers a reminder of all he lost. He uses his abilities to protect his new home, firing star orbs that bounce between enemies and reduce his cooldowns with each hit. His ultimate, a massive star that splits into smaller orbs, is a recreation of the supernova that destroyed his world—a bittersweet tribute to his fallen civilization. Cyclops is friendly and curious, always eager to learn about the cultures and creatures of this new world. He keeps a detailed log of his observations, hoping one day to send it back to any survivors. In quiet moments, he gazes at the night sky, searching for a familiar constellation, a sign that he is not alone. He dreams of rebuilding his people’s knowledge, of creating a library that spans dimensions, but for now, he fights alongside his new friends, grateful for the chance to start over.
famousFor: His spammable skills and ability to reduce cooldowns with each hit.

abilities.name: Starlight Pulse
abilities.description: Cyclops fires a star orb that bounces between enemies, dealing damage.

abilities.name: Satellite
abilities.description: He summons a satellite that follows him and damages nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Starlight Shield
abilities.description: Passively, he gains a shield. Active: He gains movement speed and reduces cooldowns.

ultimate: Cyclops unleashes a massive star that deals damage and slows enemies in an area. The star then splits into smaller orbs.
physicalAppearance: One large eye in the center of his face
weapon: Star Energy (manifests as orbs and beams)
aura: Faint starlight twinkles around him.
personality: Curious, friendly, and a bit homesick. He loves exploring and explaining cosmic phenomena.

name: Ruby
lore: Ruby was a cheerful girl from a small village, known for her love of stories and her talent for puppetry. She spent hours crafting dolls and putting on shows for the children, her laughter echoing through the streets. But a witch, jealous of the joy Ruby brought, cursed her to be forever young—trapped in a child’s body while her mind aged. In return, Ruby gained control over shadows and a magical scythe that could drain life from foes. She now wanders the land, seeking a way to break the curse, her scythe both a weapon and a burden. Her ultimate, which pulls enemies and heals her with each hit, is a reflection of her desire to hold onto life, to keep fighting despite the curse. Ruby remains kind and optimistic, always smiling, but those who look closely see the sadness in her eyes. She still makes puppets, using them to tell stories of hope and resilience, and she gives them to children she meets along the way. In her heart, she believes that one day, she’ll find the witch and convince her to lift the curse—not through force, but through kindness. Until then, she will keep fighting, keep laughing, and keep believing that even the darkest curses can be broken by the light of a pure heart.
famousFor: Her crowd control and lifesteal, allowing her to survive while kiting enemies.

abilities.name: I Don't Fear You!
abilities.description: Ruby swings her scythe, pulling enemies toward her and slowing them.

abilities.name: Howl!
abilities.description: She dashes forward, damaging and slowing enemies, and gains a shield.

abilities.name: Hunter's Strike
abilities.description: Passively, her skills grant movement speed. Active: She spins, damaging enemies.

ultimate: Ruby twirls her scythe repeatedly, pulling enemies and dealing damage over time. Each hit heals her.
physicalAppearance: Long red hair in twin tails
weapon: Blood Scythe (a large scythe with a crimson blade)
aura: Dark red mist surrounds her scythe.
personality: Kind, optimistic, and a bit playful despite her curse. She always tries to cheer up her friends and never gives up hope.

name: Sun
lore: In a hidden valley where the mountains pierce the clouds, a troop of magical monkeys raised a child they found abandoned in a bamboo grove. That child was Sun, and he grew up believing he was one of them—swinging through trees, chattering with the troop, and learning the ancient martial arts passed down through generations of simian warriors. When he discovered his human origins, Sun felt neither betrayal nor confusion; instead, he embraced both natures, becoming the bridge between two worlds. The monkeys taught him to wield a staff that could extend to impossible lengths, and to create clones of himself by plucking hairs and blowing on them. Sun now travels the Land of Dawn as the self‑proclaimed Monkey King, his mischief as legendary as his combat prowess. His ultimate, which summons multiple clones that charge forward, is a reflection of his philosophy: alone he is strong, but together they are unstoppable. Sun loves nothing more than playing tricks on arrogant warriors, using his clones to confuse and humiliate them before delivering the final blow. Yet beneath the playful exterior lies a deep sense of responsibility. He has seen the destruction that greed and ambition can wreak, and he fights to protect the innocent—both human and animal. In quiet moments, he returns to the valley, sitting with his monkey family under the stars, sharing stories of his adventures. He knows that one day he must choose between his two worlds, but for now, he revels in the joy of being both man and monkey, a trickster with a heart of gold.
famousFor: His clones and split-push ability.

abilities.name: Clone Technique
abilities.description: Sun creates a clone that mimics his actions, dealing reduced damage.

abilities.name: Staff Twist
abilities.description: He spins his staff, damaging nearby enemies and knocking them back.

abilities.name: Endless Stamina
abilities.description: Passively increases his attack speed with each hit.

ultimate: Sun summons multiple clones that charge forward, each dealing damage. The clones remain for a few seconds.
aura: A faint golden glow surrounds his clones.
personality: Mischievous, proud, and loyal to friends. He loves to play pranks but fights with honor.

name: Irithel
lore: When Irithel was a baby, her tribe was massacred by slavers, and she was left for dead in the heart of the jungle. A tigress, grieving her own lost cub, found the infant and nursed her as her own. Irithel grew up among the beasts, learning their ways, their language, their rhythms. She could run with the panthers, climb with the monkeys, and swim with the crocodiles. When she was ten, she found the remains of her human village and pieced together her origins, but by then the jungle was her only home. Years later, when poachers began decimating the animal population, Irithel took up a bow she had crafted from bone and vine, and she declared war on the invaders. Her companion, a massive tiger she named Leo, fights alongside her, their bond so deep that they move as one. Irithel’s ultimate allows her to rain arrows while running, a technique she learned from watching leopards stalk their prey. She now roams the edges of civilization, a ghost of the wild, ensuring that no one forgets the cost of destroying nature. She speaks little, but her eyes convey a depth of understanding that unnerves even the most hardened warriors. In the jungle, she is queen, and all creatures bow to her will. Yet in her heart, she sometimes wonders about the human life she never knew—the parents whose faces she cannot remember, the tribe whose songs she never learned. She keeps a single artifact from the village, a carved wooden bird, as a talisman of a past she can never reclaim. Until the day the jungle is safe, Irithel will fight with the fury of a thousand wild hearts.
famousFor: Attacking while moving and her tiger companion.

abilities.name: Strafe
abilities.description: Irithel fires arrows in a cone, damaging multiple enemies.

abilities.name: Jungle Heart
abilities.description: Passively increases her critical chance. Active: Her tiger leaps, slowing enemies.

abilities.name: Heavy Crossbow
abilities.description: Her basic attacks deal extra damage to the first enemy hit.

ultimate: Irithel and her tiger unleash a barrage of arrows, dealing massive damage in an area while she moves freely.
aura: The scent of the jungle follows her.
personality: Wild, protective, and in tune with nature. She speaks to animals and trusts them more than people.

name: Argus
lore: Argus was once the mightiest of the angels, his wings spanning the heavens, his voice commanding the celestial choirs. He led the war against the Abyss, driving back the darkness with his holy blade. But pride crept into his heart—he began to believe that the angels should rule over mortals, that their protection was owed tribute. When the Creator refused, Argus rebelled, rallying a faction of angels to his cause. The civil war that followed shattered the celestial realm, and Argus was cast out, his wings torn, his halo cracked. He fell for nine days, finally crashing into a wasteland where the sun never shines. There, the Abyss found him, offering power in exchange for allegiance. Argus accepted, and now he fights as a fallen angel, his sword wreathed in dark flames. His ultimate grants him temporary immortality, a perversion of the eternal life he once possessed. Argus is consumed by hatred—for the Creator who rejected him, for the angels who betrayed him, for the mortals who he believes caused his downfall. Yet in rare moments of clarity, he remembers the beauty of the celestial realm, the harmony of the choirs, and he weeps. He knows that he can never go back, that he is damned by his own choices. But he clings to a sliver of hope: if he can conquer enough of the Land of Dawn, perhaps he can build a new kingdom, one where he is worshipped as he always deserved. It is a delusion, but it is the only thing keeping him from utter despair. Argus marches forward, his dark wings trailing ash, a monument to the cost of pride.
famousFor: His ultimate that makes him temporarily invincible.

abilities.name: Meteor Sword
abilities.description: Argus slashes forward, dealing damage and slowing enemies.

abilities.name: Demonic Grip
abilities.description: He pulls an enemy toward him, dealing damage.

abilities.name: Wings of Darkness
abilities.description: Passively gains attack speed. Active: He dashes and gains a shield.

ultimate: Argus unleashes his fallen angel form, becoming immune to death for a few seconds. During this time, he gains massive lifesteal and attack speed.
aura: Dark flames flicker around him when his ultimate is active.
personality: Arrogant, vengeful, and charismatic. He believes he was wronged and will stop at nothing to reclaim his throne.

name: Lesley
lore: Lesley grew up in the slums of the industrial city, where survival meant staying invisible. She learned to move silently, to blend into shadows, to disappear before anyone could notice her. When the Vanguard Strike Force, an elite law enforcement agency, recruited her, they didn't see a street rat—they saw a prodigy. Lesley became their top agent, specializing in eliminating high‑value targets without leaving a trace. Her rifle, a custom‑built silenced weapon, never misses, and her camouflage suit makes her nearly invisible. But after years of service, she began to question the agency's methods. Were the targets really criminals, or just inconvenient people? When she discovered that her own parents had been killed by the agency to cover up a scandal, Lesley went rogue. She now operates independently, using her skills to expose corruption and protect the innocent. Her ultimate, a rapid‑fire sniper barrage, is her signature move—a message that no one is beyond her reach. Lesley is cold and efficient, but beneath the professional exterior lies a deep well of grief. She keeps a photo of her parents in her pocket, and on the anniversary of their death, she visits their grave and leaves a single white rose. She knows that her path is dangerous, that she might not survive, but she is driven by a need for justice—not revenge, but justice. In the shadows, she is a ghost, but a ghost with a purpose, and that purpose gives her strength.
famousFor: Her long-range true damage and stealth.

abilities.name: Master of Camouflage
abilities.description: Lesley enters stealth and gains movement speed. Her next attack deals bonus true damage.

abilities.name: Tactical Grenade
abilities.description: She throws a grenade that knocks back enemies and deals damage.

abilities.name: Lethal Shot
abilities.description: Passively, her attacks ignore some armor. Active: She fires a piercing shot.

ultimate: Lesley fires several shots in a line, each dealing physical damage. The shots prioritize enemy heroes.
aura: A faint shimmer of light when she's camouflaged.
personality: Professional, cold, and efficient. She rarely speaks and never misses her mark.

name: Zhask
lore: Deep in the void between stars, a hive mind evolved, consuming planet after planet, adding each world's biomass to its ever‑expanding collective. Zhask was the first of his kind to develop individuality—a flaw in the hive's programming that should have been corrected. But instead of being absorbed, he broke away, taking a swarm of his most loyal spawn with him. He fled across the galaxy, pursued by the hive's relentless hunters, until he crash‑landed on the Land of Dawn. Here, far from the hive's reach, Zhask has established a new colony, slowly building his strength. He is not evil in the human sense; he simply follows his nature, which is to expand, to consume, to evolve. His ultimate allows him to enhance his spawn, creating a monstrous guardian that fights for him. Zhask views other beings with detached curiosity, studying their behaviors and weaknesses before deciding whether to absorb or ignore them. He communicates through a series of clicks and pheromones, but has learned to speak human languages out of practicality. In his lair, he maintains a laboratory where he experiments with local flora and fauna, seeking ways to improve his swarm. He dreams of one day becoming strong enough to return to the void and challenge the original hive—not to rejoin, but to conquer. Until then, he waits, builds, and watches, an alien intelligence in a world that has no idea of the threat lurking beneath its surface.
famousFor: His summoned Nightmaric Spawn that deals massive damage.

abilities.name: Spawn
abilities.description: Zhask summons a Nightmaric Spawn that attacks enemies.

abilities.name: Hive Mind
abilities.description: Passively increases the spawn's stats. Active: The spawn explodes, damaging enemies.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Zhask fires a projectile that damages and slows enemies.

ultimate: Zhask enhances his spawn, making it larger and more powerful. While active, Zhask can control its abilities.
aura: A buzzing cloud of insects surrounds him.
personality: Calculating, alien, and utterly ruthless. He views all other life as inferior.

name: Vexana
lore: Vexana was the last queen of a kingdom that fell to betrayal. Her own advisors, seduced by promises of power from a neighboring empire, poisoned her during a banquet. As she lay dying, surrounded by the laughter of those she trusted, Vexana made a pact with the spirits of the dead. They offered her revenge in exchange for her service as their bridge to the living world. She accepted, and her body dissolved into ash, only to reform as the Necromancer—a being of shadow and bone, commanding legions of the restless dead. She raised her assassins as undead knights, forcing them to serve her for eternity. Her kingdom is now a haunted ruin, and Vexana rules from a throne of skulls, her only companions the whispers of the departed. Her ultimate curses an enemy hero, raising a grotesque clone if they die—a fitting punishment for traitors. Vexana is cold, calculating, and utterly without mercy, yet she is not without sorrow. In the silence of her crypt, she sometimes speaks to the ghost of her most loyal servant, asking if there is any redemption for a soul so stained. The ghost never answers, and Vexana knows that she is damned. But she clings to her power because it is all she has left—a bitter crown on a withered head. She watches the living from the shadows, envying their warmth, their laughter, their love. And in her coldest moments, she vows that if she cannot have those things, no one will.
famousFor: Summoning an undead knight and her cursed explosion.

abilities.name: Necromancy
abilities.description: Vexana summons an undead knight that attacks enemies.

abilities.name: Cursed Blast
abilities.description: She sends out a wave of dark energy, damaging and slowing enemies.

abilities.name: Grave Digger
abilities.description: Passively, enemies who die near her explode, dealing damage.

ultimate: Vexana curses an enemy hero. If the target dies during the curse, a grotesque clone rises to fight for her.
physicalAppearance: Long black hair streaked with gray
aura: A chill wind and whispers of the dead surround her.
personality: Melancholic, vengeful, and obsessed with her lost kingdom. She speaks to the dead as if they were alive.

name: Kadita
lore: Kadita was born in a floating village on the Sea of Pearls, a place where children learned to swim before they could walk. She was the daughter of the village elder, destined to lead her people. But when a great tsunami destroyed the village, Kadita was swept away, drowning in the churning waters. Instead of dying, she was saved by the spirit of the ocean—a primordial entity that recognized her pure heart. It transformed her, granting her control over water and the ability to become one with the waves. Kadita emerged from the sea as a goddess, her skin shimmering with scales, her hair flowing like kelp. She rebuilt her village and now protects all coastal communities from storms and invaders. Her ultimate summons a massive tidal wave that crashes down on enemies, a reminder of the power that nearly destroyed her but also gave her new life. Kadita is gentle and nurturing, often playing with dolphins and guiding lost ships to shore. But when angered, her fury is as terrible as the sea itself—she can summon whirlpools that drag enemies to their doom. In her heart, she still mourns those who perished in the tsunami, and she carries their memories in the shells she wears around her neck. She knows that the ocean gives and takes, and she strives to be a force for balance, a guardian who ensures that the sea's wrath is reserved for those who deserve it.
famousFor: Her invulnerability while surfing and high burst damage.

abilities.name: Ocean Wave
abilities.description: Kadita surfs forward, becoming invulnerable and damaging enemies in her path.

abilities.name: Water Burst
abilities.description: She creates a whirlpool that damages and pulls enemies.

abilities.name: Blessing of the Sea
abilities.description: Passively restores health when in water. Active: Heals herself.

ultimate: Kadita summons a massive tidal wave that crashes down, dealing huge magic damage and slowing enemies.
aura: A fine mist and the scent of saltwater follow her.
personality: Playful, curious, but fiercely protective of her domain. She loves to surf and play with dolphins.

name: Selena
